response.overview: Join Izzie, Mateo, Logan, Zoey, and Cooper as they journey into their dreams with critter companions like the majestic Foximus Maximus and the Crocodile Submarine, both hidden inside magical crystals. But it’s not all fun and games, as villains are always close by, trying to steal the crystals and turn the critters inside evil. It’s up to our heroes to stop them before it’s too late… time is ticking!
response.title: DREAMZzz: Dream Guardians Comics
